mundane humanoid.name: mundane humanoid
mundane humanoid.description: An ordinary mortal person such as a guard, bandit, merchant, villager, rogue, soldier, or cultist without supernatural defenses.

trained warrior.name: trained warrior
trained warrior.description: A disciplined martial combatant protected by armor, toughness, or battlefield training.

arcane spellcaster.name: arcane spellcaster
arcane spellcaster.description: A mortal mage, wizard, illusionist, blood mage, runesmith, or ritualist whose defenses come from spellcraft rather than monstrous nature.

priest or blessed caster.name: priest or blessed caster
priest or blessed caster.description: A mortal holy caster, shrine guardian, templar, or light-bearing servant of a sacred power.

corporeal undead.name: corporeal undead
corporeal undead.description: A physical undead body such as a zombie, ghoul, mummy, revenant, barrowguard, or death knight.

spectral undead.name: spectral undead
spectral undead.description: An incorporeal undead spirit such as a ghost, wraith, banshee, shade, or possessor.

undead spellcaster.name: undead spellcaster
undead spellcaster.description: A lich, necromantic archmage, dracolich, or other undead whose body is sustained by powerful death magic.

fiend.name: fiend
fiend.description: A demon, devil, hellhound, nightmare, soul thief, or infernal creature shaped by fire and shadow.

fire elemental.name: fire elemental
fire elemental.description: A creature made from flame, magma, ash, or living heat.

frost elemental.name: frost elemental
frost elemental.description: A creature made from ice, winter, freezing water, or supernatural cold.

storm elemental.name: storm elemental
storm elemental.description: A creature of lightning, thunder, charged wind, or living storm.

shadow creature.name: shadow creature
shadow creature.description: A shade, void-touched being, smoke spirit, nightmare thing, or creature sustained by darkness.

plant creature.name: plant creature
plant creature.description: A living plant, fungus, awakened tree, dryad-bound growth, or vegetation monster.

ooze.name: ooze
ooze.description: A slime, gelatinous cube, amorphous dungeon scavenger, or boneless acidic mass.

construct.name: construct
construct.description: An automaton, golem, animated armor, gargoyle, or other artificial body animated by magic or machinery.

stone construct.name: stone construct
stone construct.description: A stone golem, gargoyle, animated statue, or rocky artificial guardian.

lycanthrope.name: lycanthrope
lycanthrope.description: A werewolf, werebear, wererat, or other shapeshifter protected from ordinary weapons by a curse.

dragon.name: dragon
dragon.description: A true dragon or major draconic creature with elemental breath and ancient supernatural resilience.

venomous beast.name: venomous beast
venomous beast.description: A serpent, scorpion, spider, plague beast, or toxin-bearing predator.

aquatic creature.name: aquatic creature
aquatic creature.description: A merfolk, triton, kraken, marsh predator, water spirit, or creature native to rivers, swamps, lakes, or seas.

beast.name: beast
beast.description: An ordinary or oversized animal predator such as a wolf, bear, eagle, bat, ape, crab, serpent, or lizard.

aberration.name: aberration
aberration.description: A mind-warping, anatomically unnatural, or reality-wrong creature such as a mouther, doppelganger, mimic, corpse-eater, or psychic horror.

fey.name: fey
fey.description: A fairy, pixie, satyr, dryad, hag, courtier, enchanter, or other creature of glamour, bargains, and old magic.

celestial.name: celestial
celestial.description: A unicorn, skyblessed being, angelic messenger, blessed spirit, or creature of divine radiance.
